calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee, CSR# 42880. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Feb-06-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-31-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gregory Walston of The Walston Legal Group, 956-9200, appearing for plaintiff and moving party
Alfred Cavagnero, 391-4770, appearing for defendant and responding party

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ROBERT STROBEL'S Motion To Amend Complaint is denied. Proof of service is not valid. "I caused to be placed in the mail" does not show service by mail. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Set For Trial On Dec-11-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-22-06 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 622
